response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure embedded systems, with most of their career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with experience in diverse languages and systems
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven architectures and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++ experience; no demonstrated use of STL or OOP in modern industrial contexts
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), not aligned with high-performance on-prem/cloud C++ systems
